aggregator.window: (in-process aggregation, resets on restart). Current window:

cacheHit.body1: : When the semantic cache hits, AegisGate skips the upstream LLM call. Savings = estimated input + output tokens × the model's per-1K-token price. The input tokens come from the request's actual value (set by PromptCompressor); output tokens are estimated for cached_response via

compression.body: : After PromptCompressor compresses the input segment, the original length minus the compressed length is the tokens saved; the amount is computed at the target model's price (input segment only).

routing.body: : The potential savings reported when CostOptimizer recommends switching to a cheaper model. This has not actually happened yet (it is a suggestion) and is marked separately as routing_potential to avoid overstating realized savings.

fallback.mid: events this period that used degraded estimation (cost = 0) due to missing model pricing, but the token counts are still recorded accurately. Please configure

sourceSplit.title: Savings source breakdown
sourceSplit.empty: No savings events in the current window

trend.title: Savings over time
trend.empty: No trend data in the current window

modelCompare.title: Savings by model
modelCompare.empty: No model savings events in the current window

routing.title: Smart routing suggestions (potential savings)
routing.empty: CostOptimizer has no actionable switch suggestions

modality.title: Attribution by modality (preview)
modality.hint: Heuristic classification based on model name (embedding / image / whisper / tts / moderation / chat). Will later integrate
modality.empty: No attributable events in the current window
